sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70281" key="neoka/ttutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-κάττῡτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70281.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freshly sewn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0508.tlg001:47:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stratt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
